2604.23345.title: Bridging Reasoning and Action: Hybrid LLM-RL Framework for Efficient Cross-Domain Task-Oriented Dialogue
2604.23345.paper_summary: Cross-domain task-oriented dialogue requires reasoning over implicit and explicit feasibility constraints while planning long-horizon, multi-turn actions. Large language models (LLMs) can infer such constraints but are unreliable over long horizons, while Reinforcement learning (RL) optimizes long-horizon behavior yet cannot recover constraints from raw dialogue. Naively coupling LLMs with RL is therefore brittle: unverified or unstructured LLM outputs can corrupt state representations and misguide policy learning. Motivated by this, we propose Verified LLM-Knowledge empowered RL (VLK-RL), a hybrid framework that makes LLM-derived constraint reasoning usable for RL. VLK-RL first elicits candidate constraints with an LLM and then verifies them via a dual-role cross-examination procedure to suppress hallucinations and cross-turn inconsistencies. The verified constraints are mapped into ontology-aligned slot-value representations, yielding a structured, constraint-aware state for RL policy optimization. Experiments across multiple benchmarks demonstrate that VLK-RL significantly improves generalization and robustness, outperforming strong single-model baselines on long-horizon tasks.
2604.23345.paper_summary_zh: 跨域任務導向對話需要在規劃長期、多輪行動時，對隱含和明確的可行性約束進行推理。大型語言模型（LLMs）能夠推斷這些約束，但在長期範圍內不可靠，而強化學習（RL）則優化長期行為，但無法從原始對話中恢復約束。因此，將LLMs與RL簡單結合是脆弱的：未經驗證或結構不良的LLM輸出可能會破壞狀態表示並誤導策略學習。受到這一點的啟發，我們提出了經過驗證的LLM知識增強RL（VLK-RL），這是一個混合框架，使LLM衍生的約束推理可用於RL。VLK-RL首先利用LLM引出候選約束，然後通過雙重角色交叉檢查程序驗證它們，以抑制幻覺和跨輪不一致性。經過驗證的約束被映射到本體對齊的槽值表示中，產生一個結構化的、具約束意識的狀態，以便於RL策略優化。在多個基準測試中的實驗表明，VLK-RL顯著提高了泛化能力和穩健性，在長期任務上超越了強大的單模型基準。
2604.23345.author: Yangyang Zhao et.al.
2604.23345.authors: Yangyang Zhao, Linfan Dai, Li Cai, Bowen Xing, Libo Qin
